task: Put the hotdog to the left of the spoon.
raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A red hotdog is on a green cloth on a white countertop. A blue sponge is on the stovetop. The hotdog is a long, cylindrical object with a smooth surface; the cloth is a flat, green textile. STRATEGY - First, grasp the hotdog from the cloth. Then, transport it to the left side of the blue sponge on the stovetop. Failure modes include dropping the hotdog during transport or misplacing it. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the hotdog on the cloth; Step 2 grasp the hotdog body for secure hold; Step 3 transport to the left of the sponge; Step 4 place on the stovetop surface.
Goal: on(hotdog, stovetop); left_of(hotdog, sponge)
Scene: hotdog, cloth, sponge, stovetop
Step 1: reach(hotdog)
  affordance_region: the body of the red hotdog
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, hotdog, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, hotdog) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(hotdog)
  affordance_region: the body of the red hotdog
  contact: holding(hotdog) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(hotdog)
Step 3: transport(hotdog -> stovetop)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the stovetop to the left of the blue sponge
  spatial: above(hotdog, stovetop, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(hotdog)
  done_when: above(hotdog, stovetop, 0.05)
Step 4: place(hotdog -> stovetop)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the stovetop to the left of the blue sponge
  contact: surface_contact(hotdog, stovetop) [completion]; released(hotdog) [completion]
  pose: stable(hotdog) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(hotdog, stovetop) AND released(hotdog)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the red hotdog
the body of the red hotdog
an empty area on the stovetop to the left of the blue sponge
an empty area on the stovetop to the left of the blue sponge
